name: gitlab-mr-review
description: Fetch current-branch GitLab MR comments and drive review-fix workflows with glab.

interface.shortDescription: Find current-branch MR comments and fix selected review feedback.
interface.longDescription: Uses your local glab auth context to find the MR for the checked-out branch, list comments, collect selected feedback, and support code fixes.
defaultPrompt: Fetch MR comments for my current branch and list unresolved feedback.
Show numbered MR comments and ask me which ones to fix.
Apply fixes for the selected MR comments and summarize changes.
